productDisplayName: Lotus Herbals Pure Radiance Soft Beige Daily Foundation 360
description: An oil free, water based, light weight daily use foundation, easy to blend with finger tips and spreads evenly all over skin giving an ultimate &lsquo matte glow&rsquo finish, even tones skin, hides imperfections, provides a natural look with satin feel, SPF 20 sun protection enriched with botanical extracts of jojoba, soy lecithin and grape seed giving a flawless finish which lasts for hours
